title: fun mod
description: its adds coconut wood coconut logs coconut planks coconut leaves coconut fences and fence gates and a orange tool
body:
this is a fun mod for your minecraft i would reccommend just enough items for this mod to see the crafting recipes and you can get all the new things through your commands have fun its adds coconut wood coconut logs coconut planks coconut leaves coconut fences and fence gate and a orange tool all of those where made in mcreator  
use this fun mod for your minecraft fun and remember use just enough items this mod is so simple and fun for minecraft gamers so use this for your fun modpack  

can i use this in a modpack? yes  
Can i add addons to this mod? yes this mod is made for addons for people to make mods  
can i upload addons and the addons will reqiure this mod? yes
